llm_operation.reason: tf.reverse uses 'axis' not 'dims'; mindspore.ops.reverse uses 'input_x' and 'axis', both reject 'dims'. Fix parameter names to match respective APIs.
MindSpore.ops.reverse要求axis为int或tuple[int]，且TensorFlow与MindSpore对axis语义一致但MindSpore可能不支持list axis；需统一为tuple并确保输入张量值相同（原用例仅定义shape/dtype，未指定具体数值，导致随机初始化差异）

MindSpore.ops.reverse要求axis为int类型单值或int list，但实际行为与tf.reverse不一致：tf.reverse reverses all dims in axis list, while older MindSpore versions only support single axis; multi-axis requires mindspore.ops.ReverseV2 or functional API. Fix by using single axis.
